responses.electricityComment: Electricity supply has recently deteriorated post recent elections
responses.roadComment: Water logging post rains resulting in predictable traffic jams at certain location.
responses.safetyComment: No petty crimes. You can leave helmet on bike without lock and it usually never gets stolen.
responses.businessComment: Live near majpr arterial road. Need padestrian crossing infrastructure
responses.loveText: Gated community, kids can play outside without supervision.
responses.commentsText: If you arrle willing to pay or can afford it, large gated communities are best.
